KEY_MISMATCH: The object key does not belong to this vehicle.
UPLOADED_OBJECT_NOT_FOUND: The object uploaded to S3 for that key was not found.
CONTENT_TYPE_MISMATCH: The content-type does not match the uploaded object.
SIZE_MISMATCH: The size does not match the uploaded object.
DUPLICATE_IMAGE: An image with that key or name already exists.
